title: sideroxylon politum
intro: Sideroxylon politum, also known as the Forest Plum or Philippine Forest Plum, is a tree species native to the Philippines. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with its bark, roots, and leaves exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sideroxylon politum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat gastrointestinal problems, making it a sought-after herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water, or as a decoction by boiling the bark, to create a herbal remedy for various health ailments.
